text.font-family: KaiTi, Georgia, serif

svg.text: 三层推荐安全架构

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: SafetyFilter 安全过滤

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 12条硬排除规则

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 1. 过敏冲突 — 药物含患者过敏成分

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 2. 绝对禁忌症 — 患者患禁忌疾病

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 3. 致命交互 — 与现有用药严重冲突

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 4. 妊娠X级 — 孕妇绝对禁用

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 5. 儿科禁忌 — 儿童禁用药物

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 6. 哺乳期L5 — 哺乳期绝对禁用

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: ...及其他6条硬排除规则

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 9类软标记

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 相对禁忌改为"标记待审"

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 医生做最终判断，不自动排除

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 确定性判断，DP噪声不影响

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: RuleMarker 规则标记

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 7种软标记规则

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 1. 相对禁忌症 — 患者患相对禁忌疾病

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 2. 中等交互 — 与现有用药中等冲突

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 3. 妊娠C/D警告 — 孕妇慎用

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 4. 肾功能警告 — 肾损伤患者需调整

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 5. 肝功能警告 — 肝损伤患者需调整

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 6. 生育力警告 — 可能影响生育

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 7. 数据未验证 — 安全数据缺失

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 标记而非排除

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 候选药物保留参与排序

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 为DeepFM提供安全上下文标记

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 标记待审，医生可覆盖判断

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: DeepFM 排序

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 个性化评分

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 对安全候选药物精准评分

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: FM捕获特征交叉

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Deep学习高阶交互

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 连续特征旁路直通输出

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: DP噪声仅在此层

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Laplace/Gaussian噪声注入

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 临床阈值后处理保障安全

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 隐私预算追踪与预警

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 隐私保护与精度的平衡点

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 设计原则：前两层确定性安全判断不受DP噪声影响，噪声仅作用于个性化排序层

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif
